user.title: Comfortzone Heat Pump Setup
user.description:
Please enter your Loggamera credentials to integrate your Comfortzone heat pump.

**Where to find this information?**
1. Log in to your [Loggamera portal](https://portal.loggamera.se).
2. Navigate to your device settings.
3. Locate the **Device ID** (usually a number).
4. Generate or copy your **API Key**.

Select your pump model. You can change this later.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to establish a connection to the Loggamera API. Please check your network connection and ensure Loggamera services are online.
error.invalid_auth: Authentication failed. Please verify that your API Key and Device ID are correct.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred during validation. Please check the Home Assistant logs for more details.

abort.already_configured: A Comfortzone Heat Pump with this Device ID is already configured in Home Assistant.
